summary: Iteration 22 - V3 Update Testing Complete. Backend: 10/11 tests passed (91%). Frontend: All features verified. New capabilities (analyze_parcel, find_by_address, estimate_budget) working correctly. Budget card displays CAPEX/EBITDA/TRI. FIX 1 (generic poste names) verified - no 'inconnu' for S3REnR regions. FIX 2 (geocoding) working via api-adresse.data.gouv.fr.

minor.issue: LLM sometimes returns 'text' type instead of 'parcel_results' when no parcels match strict criteria - this is valid behavior but test needed adjustment

passed_tests: === BACKEND API TESTS (10/11) ===
GET /api/ returns API info (version 1.0.0)
GET /api/france/communes?q=Fos returns Fos-sur-Mer
GET /api/map/electrical-assets returns 1140 postes (≥1000 expected)
FIX 1: No 'inconnu' etat for postes in S3REnR regions (IDF, PACA, HdF)
POST /api/chat with 'Résumé des capacités réseau' returns summary type with 3 regions
NEW: POST /api/chat budget query returns parcel with budget field (CAPEX=103.6 M€, EBITDA=5.3 M€, TRI=5.1%)
NEW: POST /api/chat with address triggers find_by_address action
NEW: POST /api/chat with cadastral ref triggers analyze_parcel action
FIX 2: Geocoding via api-adresse.data.gouv.fr working
GET /api/s3renr/summary returns region data
=== FRONTEND UI TESTS ===
EmptyStatePanel visible with data-testid='empty-state-panel'
Quick search section with pills (PACA 2ha+, Fos-sur-Mer, Hauts-de-France, Score > 70, > 5 hectares, Étang de Berre)
Fos project card shows: PROJET RTE FOS-JONQUIÈRES, 3700 MW, 400 M€, 2029
Network capacity section shows PACA (3258 MW), Hauts-de-France (2925 MW), Île-de-France (SATURÉ)
Infrastructure KPIs: 1091 postes HTB, 61 DC existants, 8 landing points, 49 lignes THT
Quick search pill click opens chatbot with query pre-filled
Budget card displays in ChatBot.js with CAPEX/EBITDA/TRI grid (103.6 M€, 5.3 M€, 5.1%)
Map loads with electrical assets displayed
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user 'test_user_01' with session for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 verified V3 update: 1) FIX 1 - Generic poste names fallback working, no 'inconnu' for S3REnR regions. 2) FIX 2 - Geocoding via api-adresse.data.gouv.fr working. 3) NEW analyze_parcel action - analyzes parcels by cadastral reference. 4) NEW find_by_address action - geocodes address then searches parcels. 5) NEW estimate_budget action - returns CAPEX/EBITDA/TRI for DC projects. 6) Frontend budget card displays correctly with CAPEX=103.6 M€, EBITDA=5.3 M€, TRI=5.1% for 10MW project at Fos-sur-Mer. SYSTEM_PROMPT has 6 actions: find_parcels, analyze_parcel, find_by_address, estimate_budget, summary, chat.

new_v3_capabilities_verified.analyze_parcel: Working - analyzes parcel by cadastral ref (e.g., 13039000AE0019)
new_v3_capabilities_verified.find_by_address: Working - geocodes address via api-adresse.data.gouv.fr then searches parcels
new_v3_capabilities_verified.estimate_budget: Working - returns budget with CAPEX/EBITDA/TRI for DC projects

budget_estimation_example.query: Combien coûte un projet DC de 10MW à Fos-sur-Mer?

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - All data is real from OSM/Overpass, S3REnR, and api-adresse.data.gouv.fr
